name: scholarium-source
description: Classify sourced evidence for central HippoRAG retrieval.

interface.shortDescription: Classify sourced evidence for central HippoRAG retrieval.
interface.longDescription: Classify sourced evidence for central HippoRAG retrieval. Stateless by design: durable graph and memory operations go through the central Scholarium gateway.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create one provenance-complete Synthia source card and central graph handoff.
